name: memory
description: Canonical reflection, idle dream distillation, corpus candidate processing, and Dream cursor migration.

interface.shortDescription: Reflect and distill canonical session history.
interface.longDescription: Turns canonical session events and explicitly admitted historical corpora into provenance-backed memory records through the canonical mutation boundary.
defaultPrompt: Reflect the latest canonical session into memory.
Run an idle dream distillation cycle.
Process an admitted historical corpus into candidates.
